plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read and migrate all six requested records

function.message: Processed the next inbox request successfully. I ran the six specified finance documents through the OCR-to-frontmatter workflow by adding schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to each file and preserving each original note body verbatim below the frontmatter. After completing all six updates, I deleted the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read 99_system workflow docs before task work, used finance schema for required fields, preserved original file bodies during frontmatter migration, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request in 00_inbox/000_next-task.md asked for six specific finance records to be run through OCR workflow. Each target file contained visible required fields and line items matching finance schema requirements, enabling complete frontmatter extraction without guessing. All six files were updated and inbox cleanup performed per process-next-inbox-item and inbox-processing-v2-update workflows.
completed_steps_laconic: write frontmatter to 6 target finance files
